overall.description: Gameplay footage from a space exploration game showing a first-person walk through a rocky alien coastal landscape with a distinctive greenish-teal sky. The player navigates through a narrow canyon, ascends to a cliff overlooking an ocean, and approaches a landed spaceship on the ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage between tall stone walls

agents.ego_description: navigating through a tight canyon passage between massive grey rock walls

entered.detail: tall sheer rock face forming the left boundary of the canyon
massive textured rock wall with layered striations on the right
small loose rocks and gravel scattered across the dark ground surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow rocky canyon with towering stone walls on both sides. The player walks forward through the enclosed passage, navigating between the sheer rock faces with limited sky visibility above.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending hillside with scattered rock outcrops

events.description: exits narrow canyon into open hillside terrain with ocean view ahead

agents.ego_description: climbing up a gravel slope with a large rock formation to the right and open sky ahead

entered.detail: hazy mountain peaks visible on the horizon with snow-capped tops
teal-colored ocean visible in the distance beyond the hill crest

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon, the scene opens into a wide hillside ascent. The player climbs the gravel slope as the teal ocean becomes visible on the horizon, with distant mountains framing the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal ridge with landed spaceship and ocean overlook

events.description: reaches hilltop revealing landed spaceship and expansive coastal vista
turns right to walk along the cliff edge overlooking the ocean

agents.ego_description: walking past a landed spaceship toward the cliff edge to observe the alien ocean

notable_agents.action: landed twin-tail fighter spaceship parked on the ridge with engines stowed

entered.detail: dark grey sci-fi fighter craft with twin vertical stabilizers parked on the hillside
vast teal-green ocean with gentle waves lapping against the rocky shore
large weathered rock formation at the cliff edge overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: Reaching the hilltop, the player discovers a landed spaceship on the left and a stunning coastal view to the right. The camera turns to follow the cliff edge, revealing the teal alien ocean and distant rock islands while passing the parked fighter craft.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach path along alien ocean shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline observing the teal ocean waves and distant rock formations

entered.detail: rocky outcroppings rising from the ocean surface in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the coastal path with the teal ocean now dominating the right side of the frame. The shoreline features dark sand and scattered rocks, with distant islands visible through the atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship landing site on coastal ridge

events.description: turns inland from the coast to approach the landed spaceship

agents.ego_description: walking toward the landed spaceship to board or interact with the vehicle

notable_agents.action: landed spaceship with open canopy revealing the cockpit interior

entered.detail: twin-tail fighter craft viewed from the front with detailed cockpit and landing gear

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the ocean, the player approaches the landed spaceship from the front. The craft's detailed cockpit, twin vertical stabilizers, and landing gear become prominent as the player walks up to board the vehicle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the depths of a claustrophobic rocky canyon to the open expanse of a coastal ridge where a spaceship awaits. It begins by navigating a narrow passage between towering stone walls, moving forward until the enclosed space gives way to a wide, gravelly hillside ascent. As the player climbs, the horizon expands to reveal a teal alien ocean and distant mountains, eventually reaching a hilltop where the camera pans across a cliff edge and a parked fighter craft. The scene then shifts to follow a coastal path with dark sands and hazy islands dominating the view before turning away from the water. Finally, the camera approaches the landed spaceship from the front, closing in on the detailed cockpit and vertical stabilizers as the player moves to board the vehicle.
